name: Puequ CO.,LTD.
summary: Puequ CO.,LTD. produces and sells pumps, blowers, air conditioners, and factory equipment. The company also manufactures and sells heat exchangers, firefighting disaster prevention equipment, industrial equipment, and construction machinery and tools; receiving, elevated, and merging tanks; and boilers, air conditioner incinerators, cooling towers, compressors, transport equipment, valve fittings, grease traps, oil water separators, underwater stirrers, house equipment related products, and wastewater treatment facility equipment, as well as ozone, nitrogen, and oxygen generators. In addition, it provides equipment repair, maintenance inspection, and design execution services. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Fukuyama, Japan.
